Alexander the Great Not So Great
TimelineThe Philip Factorvs NapoleonSources

Sources

Academic citations including recent scholarship (2020-2025)

Recent Scholarship (2020-2025)

The Sacred Band: Three Hundred Theban Lovers Fighting to Save Greek Freedom

Romm, James

Scribner, 2022

Examines military context of Philip's conquests and Alexander's inheritance of Theban tactical innovations

Alexander der Große: Eine Bilanz

Müller, Sabine

Kohlhammer Verlag, 2021

German reassessment emphasizing Alexander's administrative failures and dependence on Philip's infrastructure

Alexander der Große und die Logistik des Alexanderzuges

Rathmann, Michael

Franz Steiner Verlag, 2020

Analysis of Alexander's logistics showing they were continuations of Philip's supply systems

Recent Napoleon Sources (2020-2025)

Napoleon: Life, Legacy, and Image - A Biography

Forrest, Alan

Yale University Press, 2023

Recent reassessment of Napoleon's military and administrative innovations

Napoleon's Wars: An International History, 1803-1815

Esdaile, Charles

Penguin, 2024

Latest comprehensive analysis of Napoleonic warfare and legacy

Academic Note

Recent scholarship (2020-2025) continues to support the thesis that Alexander's achievements were heavily dependent on Philip II's military foundations, while Napoleon's innovations remain well-documented in contemporary military historiography.
